findings.blocker: Statement is TRUE (stalkwise: (F ◁ g)_x = id_{F_x} ⊗ g_x is an iso since a J.W-map is a stalkwise iso). Proof needs two Mathlib-absent ingredients at the PresheafOfModules level: (d.1) module-level J.W ⟺ stalkwise-iso bridge on Opens X (Mathlib has only TopCat-sheaf / separated versions, not bridged to CategoryTheory.Presheaf.IsLocallyInjective (Opens.grothendieckTopology X)); (d.2) stalk commutes with the relative module-presheaf tensor, (A⊗ᵖB)_x ≅ A_x ⊗_{R_x} B_x (Mathlib has only the sectionwise tensorObj_obj). ~200-400 LOC stalk-infra port. NOT a dead end — technique is Mathlib-blessed (Sites.Point.IsMonoidalW + TopCat.hasEnoughPoints).
